critic_notes: no patch emitted; recommendation is hold or investigation
expected_effect: Avoid speculative or no-op patches while directing the next work toward better failure evidence.

intervention.expected_effect: Avoid speculative or no-op patches while directing the next work toward better failure evidence.
intervention.rationale: `zero_score` is an outcome label, not an actionable root cause, so another bounded config patch would be weakly supported. Candidate evidence points to: coordinate_click_miss=1, missed_scroll_target=1, terminal_output_blindness=1.
intervention.risk: Does not immediately improve success rate until the residual failures are classified more precisely.
intervention.summary: Keep the candidate config and classify remaining zero-score failures before changing config again.
